title: Hash Commands
description: Operasi pada tipe data Hash di Redis — seperti object/map untuk menyimpan field-value pairs.

commands.name: HSET / HGET
commands.title: Set dan Get Field
commands.description: Menyimpan dan mengambil field value dari hash.
commands.syntax:
HSET key field value [field value ...]
HGET key field
HMGET key field [field ...]

options.description: Set hanya jika field belum ada

commands.examples:
HSET user:1 name "John" email "john@mail.com" age 30
HGET user:1 name
HMGET user:1 name email
HGETALL user:1
HSETNX user:1 role "user"
commands.notes: Hash efisien untuk menyimpan objek — lebih hemat memori dari multiple key.

commands.name: HDEL / HEXISTS / HLEN
commands.title: Menghapus dan Memeriksa Field
commands.description: Menghapus field, mengecek keberadaan, dan menghitung jumlah field.
commands.syntax:
HDEL key field [field ...]
HEXISTS key field
HLEN key
commands.examples:
HDEL user:1 age
HEXISTS user:1 email  # 1 (ada) atau 0 (tidak ada)
HLEN user:1
HKEYS user:1
HVALS user:1
commands.notes: HDEL mendukung hapus multiple field sekaligus.

commands.name: HINCRBY / HINCRBYFLOAT
commands.title: Increment Field Value
commands.description: Menambah nilai numerik pada field hash secara atomic.
commands.syntax:
HINCRBY key field increment
HINCRBYFLOAT key field increment
commands.examples:
HSET product:1 views 0 price 99.99
HINCRBY product:1 views 1
HINCRBY product:1 views 5
HINCRBYFLOAT product:1 price 10.50
commands.notes: Sangat berguna untuk counters per-object (views, likes, etc).

commands.name: HSCAN
commands.title: Iterasi Field Hash
commands.examples:
HSCAN user:1 0
HSCAN user:1 0 MATCH "name*"
HSCAN user:1 0 COUNT 100
commands.notes: Gunakan HSCAN untuk hash besar — HGETALL bisa blocking pada hash dengan banyak field.
